name: Paladin of Dark Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>黒竜の聖騎士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナイト・オブ・ブラックドラゴン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can Ritual Summon this card with "Dark Dragon Ritual". At the start of the Damage Step, if this card attacks a Defense Position monster: Destroy that monster. You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 "Red-Eyes" monster from your hand or Deck. You can only use this effect of "Paladin of Dark Dragon" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can Ritual Summon this card with "Dark Dragon Ritual". At the start of the Damage Step, if this card attacks a Defense Position monster: Destroy that monster. You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 "Red-Eyes" monster from your hand or Deck. You can only use this effect of "Paladin of Dark Dragon" once per turn.
eff: You can Ritual Summon this card with "Dark Dragon Ritual". At the start of the Damage Step, if this card attacks a Defense Position monster: Destroy that monster. You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 "Red-Eyes" monster from your hand or Deck. You can only use this effect of "Paladin of Dark Dragon" once per turn.

sets.set: Dragons of Legend: The Complete Series

jp_sets.set: Collectors Pack: Duelist of Destiny Version

mst: Destroys your opponent's Defense Position Monster Cards
Destroys battling monster at the start of the Damage Step
